summary: All three core requirements (REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3) are implemented in the diff. The iframe is embedded with the correct src, the branded bar displays all required attribution text, and the dark gallery theme with warm gold/amber accents is applied. One minor hallucinated feature is present: a caffeine.ai attribution link added to the branded bar, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Built with love using caffeine.ai' link pointing to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters was added to the branded bar.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies attribution text for the mural project, commissioner, artist, and app builder (T3kNo-Logic.xyz). No caffeine.ai branding or link was requested.
